English: A long time ago, 2 particular clans existed.
They started off living rather quiet and peaceful lives, separate from each other.
But both possessed an ancient power.
"TENSION".
A type of energy that derives solely from one's SOUL.
It can then be manifested into any form the user desires, among other things.
However one of the clans, self-dubbed the "Defective" clan, were unable to access a basic human aspect.
"ADRENALINE".
A primordial essence derived purely of instinct.
Blood pressure rises, limits unbounded, pain subsides...
TENSION unlimited.
Transformations possible.
"Immortal". That's how many would describe it.
Hearing that convinced the Defective clan...
They wanted nothing more than to harness that power.
The first shift upon this world.
One day, a full-on attack against the other clan, dubbed the "Adrenaline" clan, took place.
Many perished. Some fought back. Few were able to run away.
Despite the Defective clan lacking ADRENALINE, they made up for it by being stronger overall.
With that, they almost wipe out the Adrenaline clan.
Any fresh blood spilled was then harvested.
To which they injected them into their bloodstream, allowing them access to ADRENALINE.
As time went on, more and more of the Adrenaline clan were hunted down.
But at the same time, more of the Defective clan kept dying.
Their bodies, not built to handle ADRENALINE, end up melting.
With the defective clan also brought to the brink, the slaughter stops.
Because of this, as centuries go by, both clans regrow and rebuild.
Unfortunately, TENSION got lost to time.
Everything felt stagnate.
But then, two beings...
A boy. A girl.
These two...
Descendants of their clans.
7 years before now...
They unknowingly crossed paths.
Which caused the first shift of the world since generations ago.
With it, TENSION resurfaced.
Both of them being the originators.
Then helping their peers awaken their own TENSION.
This ancient art has now become second-nature to many.
Unfortunately, this shift is a monkey's paw.
The Defective clan has risen once more.
And they plan on killing more to develop a new ADRENALINE.
You must stop them.
But before you do...
Appreciated.
That name is familiar...
Interesting...
Regardless, it is appreciated.
Thank you.
Many roadblocks are ahead.
But you shall persevere.
Welcome to...
